examples.title: Dijkstra's Algorithm
examples.description: Shortest path calculation for link-state routing
examples.code:
INITIALIZE-SINGLE-SOURCE(G, s)
S = ∅
Q = G.V
while Q ≠ ∅
    u = EXTRACT-MIN(Q)
    S = S ∪ {u}
    for each vertex v ∈ G.Adj[u]
        RELAX(u, v, w)
examples.explanation: Builds shortest path tree by iteratively selecting node with minimum distance
